tool.name: Paraview
tool.command:
export HOME=\$PWD && mkdir ./input/ && chown -R 1000:1000 ./input &&
#for $img in $infile: #if $img.element_identifier.endswith($img.ext) ln -s '$img' './input/${img.element_identifier}' && #else: ln -s '$img' './input/${img.element_identifier}.${img.ext}' && #end if #end for
/init
tool.help: ParaView is an open-source, multi-platform application designed to visualize data sets of varying sizes from small to very large.
